# RC-09: Third-Party Continuous Risk Monitoring

**Track:** Risk Controls (`RC`) · **Priority:** COULD (optional) · **Status:** draft

Continuously monitor the risk posture of critical ICT third-party providers and SaaS vendors: service availability (uptime tracking), security advisories and patches, known breach notifications, compliance certification expiry (SOC 2, ISO 27001), SLA performance against contractual terms, and credit/financial health. Alert when provider risk score changes materially (e.g., critical vulnerability disclosed, breach announced, certification expired). RC-08 monitors internal health; this control monitors the external supply chain. Correlate third-party risk with change deployment: if a critical provider risk is identified, assess whether it impacts the deployed system.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 6 | Observability & Maintenance | Conditional | *Third-party continuous monitoring is important for full DORA Art. 28 compliance but depends on mature third-party risk intelligence tooling and vendor relationships. Phase 3 capability.*

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent monitors, human reviews and reports |
| **Agent does** | Continuously monitor critical third-party providers: subscribe to their security advisories, track vulnerability disclosures, check compliance certification renewal status, monitor SLA performance (uptime, latency). Aggregate risk indicators. Alert on material risk changes (critical advisory, certification expiry, SLA breach). |
| **Human does** | Review alerts. When a third-party risk is identified: assess impact on deployed systems, determine escalation path (contact vendor, request patch, plan migration), and update risk register. Report material third-party risks to senior management. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Third-party provider registry | GC-03 | List of critical ICT service providers and SaaS vendors |
| Third-party risk intelligence feeds | Security advisories, vulnerability databases, compliance tracking services |  |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Third-Party Risk Dashboard | report | Real-time view of critical providers: risk scores, recent advisories, certification status, SLA performance. Alerts for material risk changes. | Operational (ongoing monitoring) |
| Third-Party Risk Incident Reports | report | Documented incidents/advisories from third parties: description, impact assessment, action taken | 7 years (audit trail) |
| Provider remediation tickets | decision | For each significant third-party risk: action plan (patch request, vendor communication, system redesign), owner, target date | 7 years |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | continuous |
| **SLA** | 120 (for alert triage and initial assessment) min |
| **Tooling** | Third-party risk intelligence platforms (SecurityScorecard, BitSight, RiskRecon), Vulnerability aggregators (CVE feeds, GitHub Advisory), Compliance tracking (CertMetrics, Axio360), Custom vendor health dashboards |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | escalate |
| **Escalate to** | Chief Risk Officer |

If a critical third-party risk is identified (e.g., zero-day, SLA breach, certification expired) affecting deployed systems, escalate to CRO for incident response and potential vendor escalation.

## Dependencies

- `GC-03`
- `RC-08`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 28(3) | Entities must maintain registers of all ICT service contractual arrangements and review them periodically (at least yearly) |
| DORA | Art. 28(4-8) | Pre-contract and ongoing due diligence on third-party providers including concentration risk assessment and performance monitoring |
| DORA | Art. 10-11 | Detection and response mechanisms must cover third-party-introduced risks |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Risk Management · **Owner role:** Third-Party Risk Manager
